(******************************************************************

 Preservation of coproducts by left biadjoints

 ******************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.CompositesAndInverses.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.ClosedUnderInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biadjunction.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Preservation.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Colimits.Coproducts.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section BiadjunctionPreservation.
  Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
          {L : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
          (R : left_biadj_data L).

  Definition left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell
             (x : B₂)
             {y₁ y₂ : B₁}
             (p : bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂)
    : hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
      ⟶
      category_binproduct (hom (L y₁) x) (hom (L y₂) x)
    := biadj_right_hom R p x
       ∙ universal_coprod_functor p (R x)
       ∙ pair_functor
           (biadj_left_hom R y₁ x)
           (biadj_left_hom R y₂ x).

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (biadj_right_hom R p x
   ∙ universal_coprod_functor p (R x))
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (pair_functor (biadj_left_hom R y₁ x)
     (biadj_left_hom R y₂ x))

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (biadj_right_hom R p x
   ∙ universal_coprod_functor p (R x))
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (universal_coprod_functor p (R x))

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats (biadj_right_hom R p x)
 exact (adj_equivalence_of_cats_inv (biadj_hom_equiv R p x)).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (universal_coprod_functor p (R x))
 apply (make_is_universal_coprod_cocone HB₁ _ Hp).

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p

  (pair_functor (biadj_left_hom R y₁ x)
     (biadj_left_hom R y₂ x))

Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p

x: B₂

x: B₂

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p
adj_equivalence_of_cats (biadj_left_hom R y₁ x)
 exact (biadj_hom_equiv R y₁ x).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
x: B₂
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
Hp: has_bincoprod_ump p

 exact (biadj_hom_equiv R y₂ x).
  Defined.

  Section PreserveCoproducts.
    Context {y₁ y₂ : B₁}
            (p : bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂)
            (x : B₂).

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
nat_trans_data
  (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)
  (universal_coprod_functor
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
nat_trans_data
  (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)
  (universal_coprod_functor
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
category_binproduct (hom (L y₁) x) (hom (L y₂) x)
⟦ left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p f,
universal_coprod_functor
  (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x f ⟧

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
# L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p · (biadj_unit R p · # R f))
· biadj_counit R x ==>
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) · f
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
# L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p · (biadj_unit R p · # R f))
· biadj_counit R x ==>
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p) · f

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
# L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p · (biadj_unit R p · # R f))
· biadj_counit R x ==>
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) · f
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
id₁ (L p)
· (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p)) ==>
id₁ (L p)

        exact ((_ ◃ (_ ◃ (linvunitor _ • (_ ◃ rinvunitor _))))
               • invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_l R) p).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
# L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p · (biadj_unit R p · # R f))
· biadj_counit R x ==>
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p) · f
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f: B₂ ⟦ L p, x ⟧
id₁ (L p)
· (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p)) ==>
id₁ (L p)

        exact ((_ ◃ (_ ◃ (linvunitor _ • (_ ◃ rinvunitor _))))
               • invertible_modcomponent_of (biadj_triangle_l R) p).
    Defined.

    Opaque psfunctor_comp.

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
is_nat_trans (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)
  (universal_coprod_functor
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x)
  left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
is_nat_trans (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p)
  (universal_coprod_functor
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x)
  left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p) α
· left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₂ =
left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₁
· # (universal_coprod_functor
       (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x) α

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
pr1 (# (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p) α)
· pr1
    (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₂) =
pr1 (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₁)
· pr1
    (# (universal_coprod_functor
          (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x) α)
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
pr2 (# (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p) α)
· pr2
    (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₂) =
pr2 (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₁)
· pr2
    (# (universal_coprod_functor
          (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x) α)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
pr1 (# (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p) α)
· pr1
    (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₂) =
pr1 (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₁)
· pr1
    (# (universal_coprod_functor
          (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x) α)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
· ((((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                 (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
             • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x))
            • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                 ^-1))
           • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂)
          • ((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂))
         • lunitor f₂))) =
((((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
   ▹ biadj_counit R x)
  • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
      (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
               (# R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
           • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x))
          • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
               ^-1))
         • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
             (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁)
        • ((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
       • lunitor f₁)))
· (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((## L
    (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
     ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x))
         • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
            ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
              ^-1))
        • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂)
       • ((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂))
      • lunitor f₂)) =
(((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
               (# R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
           • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x))
          • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
               ^-1))
         • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
             (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁)
        • ((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
       • lunitor f₁))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((## L
    (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
     ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
   ▹ biadj_counit R x) = ?y'

 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
▹ biadj_counit R x = ?y'

▹ biadj_counit R x = ?b

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
         # L
           (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
            · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)): (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
       # L
         (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
          · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
   • ## L
       (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
        ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))) =
(λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
       # L
         (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
          · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
   • psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
         # L
           (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
            · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)): ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
    • ## L
        (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
         ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    • psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

q: (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
   • (## L
        (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
         ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
      • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
           (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)) =
(psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))

        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
           (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

y₁, y₂: B₁

x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (id₂
   (# L
      (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
       · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)))
 • ## L
     (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
      ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: ## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p
   ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inl p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            exact q.
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)))
▹ biadj_counit R x = ?y'

          exact (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b0
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b0 = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b0

            
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L

  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
    (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x) =

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?y' =
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
    (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)

            apply rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
   (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
       ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
       ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)

                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))

     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?t2 =
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))

          apply lwhisker_vcomp.

x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ ((## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
      ▹ biadj_counit R x)) = ?y'

   • ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
      ▹ biadj_counit R x)) = ?b0

R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧

• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
         # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
    ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
     ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (biadj_unit R p) (## R α)): (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
       # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
  • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
   ^-1)
  (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
   • ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) =
(λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
       # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
  • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
   ^-1)
  ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
         # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
    ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
     ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (biadj_unit R p) (## R α)): ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
    • ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
 • ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
    • psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
   • (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1)) =
(psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

   • (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1)) =

• ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • id₂ (# L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₂)))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)

q: (id₂ (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
 • ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• (# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))

• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• (# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)

B₁, B₂: bicat

((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
 • (# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α)))
▹ biadj_counit R x = ?t2

              exact (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
      ▹ biadj_counit R x)) = ?y'

            exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
       ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
       ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
       ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
       ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂))))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
               • lunitor f₁))))) = ?y'

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))

             • lunitor f₁)))))

 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))

                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x)
    • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)

                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))

             • lunitor f₁)))))

     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

    ▹ biadj_counit R x))

   ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?b

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?t2

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))

 ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x)

                   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                      ◃ (linvunitor
                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                  • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
             • lunitor f₁)))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
     ▹ biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
     ▹ biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?b0

 ▹ biadj_counit R x)

    (biadj_counit R x) = ?t2

              
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₂))
    (biadj_counit R x)

              apply rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
      ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))) = ?y'

            exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x)
    • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
        ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
       • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
          • (((linvunitor
                 (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                  · biadj_counit R (L p))
               • ((id₁ (L p)
                   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                      ◃ (linvunitor
                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                  • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
             • lunitor f₁)))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x)
    • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
        ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
       • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
          • (((linvunitor
                 (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                  · biadj_counit R (L p))
               • ((id₁ (L p)
                   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                      ◃ (linvunitor
                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                  • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
             • lunitor f₁)))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))
