(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))

     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)

           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁

            • lunitor f₁)))) = ?y'

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
        ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
       • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
          • (((linvunitor
                 (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                  · biadj_counit R (L p))
               • ((id₁ (L p)
                   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                      ◃ (linvunitor
                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                  • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
             • lunitor f₁)))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
        ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
       • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
          • (((linvunitor
                 (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                  · biadj_counit R (L p))
               • ((id₁ (L p)
                   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                      ◃ (linvunitor
                           (biadj_counit ... ...)
                         • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                  • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
             • lunitor f₁))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inl
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p)) (# L (# R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))

 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)

    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁

                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))

         • (((linvunitor

                        • (id₁ (L ...)

    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))

   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)

                        • (id₁ (L ...)

            • lunitor f₂)))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))

       • (((linvunitor

                      • (id₁ (L ...)

               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)

• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?b

               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))

     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
      • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
   • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
      • (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
         • lunitor f₂))) = ?t2

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
       • (((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)

                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
      • (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
         • lunitor f₂))) = ?b0

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
      ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)) =
?y'

◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
      ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)) =

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : biadj_counit R
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p)
         · # (Identity.id_psfunctor B₂) f₁ ==>
         # (Composition.comp_psfunctor L R) f₂
         · biadj_counit R x,
   ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1 • z)
   • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
  (psnaturality_natural (biadj_counit R)
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x f₁ f₂ α): (λ z : biadj_counit R
         (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p)
       · # (Identity.id_psfunctor B₂) f₁ ==>
       # (Composition.comp_psfunctor L R) f₂
       · biadj_counit R x,
 ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1 • z)
 • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
  ((biadj_counit R
      (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p)
    ◃ ## (Identity.id_psfunctor B₂) α)
   • psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) =
(λ z : biadj_counit R
         (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p)
       · # (Identity.id_psfunctor B₂) f₁ ==>
       # (Composition.comp_psfunctor L R) f₂
       · biadj_counit R x,
 ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1 • z)
 • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
  (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁
   • (## (Composition.comp_psfunctor L R) α
      ▹ biadj_counit R x))
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : biadj_counit R (L p) · f₁ ==>
         # L (# R f₂) · biadj_counit R x,
   ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1 • z)
   • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
  (psnaturality_natural (biadj_counit R) (L p) x f₁
     f₂ α): ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
 • ((biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)
    • psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂))
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 =
((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
 • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁
    • (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• ((biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)
   • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂
      • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)) =
(psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁
   • ((## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1))
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• ((biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)
   • id₂ (biadj_counit R (L p) · f₂)) =
(psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁
   • ((## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1))
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α) =
(psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁
   • ((## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1))
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α) =
(((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
  • psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
 • (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α) =
(id₂ (# L (# R f₁) · biadj_counit R x)
 • (## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
• (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α) =
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1
(## L (## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1 = ?t20

                exact (!q).
              
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (biadj_unit R p)
◃ ((psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1
   • (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)) = ?t2

              exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
            
B₁, B₂: bicat

x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
   • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
      ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α))) = ?y'

            exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α))))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
      • (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
         • lunitor f₂))) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂)))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
       • (((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
       • (((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂))))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
       • (((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p)
       ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
         • (((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
            • lunitor f₂))))

 ◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
     ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
    • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
       • (((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)

          • lunitor f₁))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
    ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
   • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
      • (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
         • lunitor f₁))) = ?y'

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

          • lunitor f₁))))

   ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
      • (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
   • (((linvunitor
          (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
        • ((id₁ (L p)
            ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
               ◃ (linvunitor
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                  • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                     ◃ rinvunitor
                         (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
           • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)) =
?t2

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
      ◃ (((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
         • lunitor f₂))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ (biadj_counit R (L p) ◃ α)))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
    ◃ lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
   ◃ (((linvunitor
          (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
        • ((id₁ (L p)
            ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
               ◃ (linvunitor
                    (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                  • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                     ◃ rinvunitor
                         (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
           • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)) =
?b

         • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))

      (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
    • ((id₁ (L p)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((linvunitor
       (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
     • ((id₁ (L p)
         ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
            ◃ (linvunitor (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
               • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                  ◃ rinvunitor
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
   • (id₁ (L p) ◃ α)) = ?y'

            exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
  ◃ ((linvunitor
        (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
      • ((id₁ (L p)
          ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
             ◃ (linvunitor
                  (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                   ◃ rinvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
         • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ (id₁ (L p) ◃ α)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ lunitor f₂) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((linvunitor
       (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
     • ((id₁ (L p)
         ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
            ◃ (linvunitor (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
               • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                  ◃ rinvunitor
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ (id₁ (L p) ◃ α))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ lunitor f₂)) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((linvunitor
        (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
      • ((id₁ (L p)
          ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
             ◃ (linvunitor
                  (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                   ◃ rinvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
         • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ ((linvunitor
       (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
     • ((id₁ (L p)
         ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
            ◃ (linvunitor (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
               • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                  ◃ rinvunitor
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ (id₁ (L p) ◃ α))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ lunitor f₂))

x: B₂

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
 ◃ (((linvunitor
        (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
      • ((id₁ (L p)
          ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
             ◃ (linvunitor
                  (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                   ◃ rinvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
         • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))

     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ (((linvunitor
       (# L (biadj_unit R p) · biadj_counit R (L p))
     • ((id₁ (L p)
         ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
            ◃ (linvunitor (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
               • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))
                  ◃ rinvunitor
                      (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))))))
        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁) =
?y'

          exact (!(lwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).

 ◃ ((linvunitor

            ◃ (linvunitor (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
               • (id₁ (L (pr1 R (L p)))

 ◃ ((linvunitor

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁

x: B₂

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ lunitor f₁)
• (bincoprod_cocone_inl
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ (id₁ (L p) ◃ α))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ lunitor f₂)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p) ◃ (lunitor f₁ • α) =
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inl p)
◃ ((id₁ (L p) ◃ α) • lunitor f₂)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
lunitor f₁ • α = (id₁ (L p) ◃ α) • lunitor f₂

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(id₁ (L p) ◃ α) • lunitor f₂ = lunitor f₁ • α

        apply vcomp_lunitor.
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
pr2 (# (left_biadj_preserves_binprods_1cell x p) α)
· pr2
    (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₂) =
pr2 (left_biadj_preserves_bincoprod_nat_trans_data f₁)
· pr2
    (# (universal_coprod_functor
          (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x) α)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
· ((((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                 (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
             • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x))
            • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                 ^-1))
           • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂)
          • ((linvunitor
                (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 · biadj_counit R (L p))
              • ((id₁ (L p)
                  ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                     ◃ (linvunitor
                          (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                        • (id₁ (L ...)
                           ◃ rinvunitor
                               (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
                 • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂))
         • lunitor f₂))) =
((((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
   ▹ biadj_counit R x)
  • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
      (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
      (biadj_counit R x))
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
               (# R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
           • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x))
          • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
               ^-1))
         • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
             (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁)
        • ((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
       • lunitor f₁)))
· (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((## L
    (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
     ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x))
         • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
            ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
              ^-1))
        • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂)
       • ((linvunitor
             (# L (biadj_unit R p)
              · biadj_counit R (L p))
           • ((id₁ (L p)
               ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                  ◃ (linvunitor
                       (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                     • (id₁ (L (pr1 R ...))
                        ◃ rinvunitor
                            (biadj_counit (pr1 R)
                               (L p))))))
              • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂))
      • lunitor f₂)) =
(((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (((((((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
               (# R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
           • rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x))
          • (# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
               ^-1))
         • lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
             (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁)
        • ((linvunitor
              (# L (biadj_unit R p)
               · biadj_counit R (L p))
            • ((id₁ (L p)
                ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                   ◃ (linvunitor
                        (biadj_counit (pr1 R) (L p))
                      • (id₁ (L ...)
                         ◃ rinvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)))))
               • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁))
       • lunitor f₁))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(## L
   (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((## L
    (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
     ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat

R: left_biadj_data L

   (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
   ▹ biadj_counit R x) = ?y'

 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)

## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
         # L
           (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
            · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)): (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
       # L
         (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
          · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
   • ## L
       (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
        ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))) =
(λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
       # L
         (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
          · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
   • psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            
B₁, B₂: bicat

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         · # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁) ==>
         # L
           (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
            · (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)): ((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
    • ## L
        (bincoprod_cocone_inr p
         ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    • psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
        (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)
   • (## L
        (bincoprod_cocone_inr p

(psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)

           (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1))

  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p

• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
## L
  (bincoprod_cocone_inr p ◃ (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
• (psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) ^-1 = ?t2

            exact q.
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)))
▹ biadj_counit R x = ?y'

          exact (!(rwhisker_vcomp _ _ _)).
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
     ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
        (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
        (biadj_counit R x)
      • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
         ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
                (# R f₂)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
            • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
               • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                   ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                        f₂) ^-1)
                  • (lassociator
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                       (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                     • (((linvunitor
                            (# L (...)
                             · biadj_counit R (...))
                          • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                             • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                         ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂)))))))) =
((psfunctor_comp L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
       ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
           ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
          • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
             • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                 ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R)
                      f₁) ^-1)
                • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                     (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                   • (((linvunitor
                          (# L (...)
                           · biadj_counit R (...))
                        • ((id₁ ... ◃ (...))
                           • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                       ▹ f₁) • lunitor f₁))))))
      • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
           (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)))

((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• (rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x)
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) = 
?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b0

R: left_biadj_data L

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b0 = ?b

(((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α))
  ▹ biadj_counit R x)
 • rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
     (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂))
     (biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))

                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b0

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
    (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x) =

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂

?y' =
((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
  ◃ ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
• rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
    (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)

            apply rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
   (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
 • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
       ▹ biadj_counit R x)))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          apply vassocl.
        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
       ▹ biadj_counit R x))
   • (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
      ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
          ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
         • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
            • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
                ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
                  ^-1)
               • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                    (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
                  • (((linvunitor
                         (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                          · biadj_counit R (L p))
                       • ((id₁ (L p)
                           ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                          • biadj_triangle_l R p))
                      ▹ f₂) • lunitor f₂))))))) =
rassociator (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p))
  (# L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
• ((# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
    ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
        ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
       • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
            (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
          • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
              ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁)
                ^-1)
             • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                  (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
                • (((linvunitor
                       (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                        · biadj_counit R (L p))
                     • ((id₁ (L p) ◃ (# L ... ◃ (...)))
                        • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                   • lunitor f₁))))))
   • (bincoprod_cocone_inr
        (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α))

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)
       • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)
          • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
               (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₁
             • (((linvunitor
                    (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                     · biadj_counit R (L p))
                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L

(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

?b =
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
 ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
     ▹ biadj_counit R x)
    • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
         (# L (# R f₁)) (biadj_counit R x)

           ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₁) ^-1)

                  • ((id₁ (L p)
                      ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                         ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                     • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₁)
                • lunitor f₁))))))
• (bincoprod_cocone_inr
     (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) ◃ α)

        
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
(# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
 ◃ (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x))
• (# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
   ◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
       ^-1 ▹ biadj_counit R x)
      • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
           (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
         • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
             ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂)
               ^-1)
            • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
                 (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
               • (((linvunitor
                      (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                       · biadj_counit R (L p))
                    • ((id₁ (L p)
                        ◃ (# L (biadj_unit ... p)
                           ◃ (linvunitor ... • (...))))
                       • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
                  • lunitor f₂)))))) = ?b

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂))))) = ?t2

          
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?t2 =
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
◃ (((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
    ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • (rassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
        (# L (# R f₂)) (biadj_counit R x)
      • ((# L (biadj_unit R p)
          ◃ (psnaturality_of (biadj_counit R) f₂) ^-1)
         • (lassociator (# L (biadj_unit R p))
              (biadj_counit R (L p)) f₂
            • (((linvunitor
                   (# L (biadj_unit R p)
                    · biadj_counit R (L p))
                 • ((id₁ (L p)
                     ◃ (# L (biadj_unit (pr1 R) p)
                        ◃ (linvunitor
                             (biadj_counit ... ...)
                           • (id₁ ... ◃ rinvunitor ...))))
                    • biadj_triangle_l R p)) ▹ f₂)
               • lunitor f₂)))))

          apply lwhisker_vcomp.

x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
?b0 = ?y'

            
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# L (bincoprod_cocone_inr p)
◃ ((## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α) ▹ biadj_counit R x)
   • ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
      ▹ biadj_counit R x)) = ?b0

   ▹ biadj_counit R x) = ?t2

p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂

α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧

• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
         # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
    ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
     ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (biadj_unit R p) (## R α)): (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
       # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
  • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
   ^-1)
  (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
   • ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)) =
(λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
       # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
 ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
  • z)
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
   ^-1)
  ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q:= maponpaths
  (λ z : # L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₁) ==>
         # L (biadj_unit R p · # R f₂),
   ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁))
    ^-1 • z)
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂))
     ^-1)
  (psfunctor_lwhisker L (biadj_unit R p) (## R α)): ((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
 • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
    • ## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
((psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
 • ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
    • psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)))
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

                
B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
f₁, f₂: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x
α: hom (psfunctor_bincoprod_cocone L p) x ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
q: (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)
   • (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1)) =
(psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₁)) ^-1
• ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1))
## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
• (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p) (# R f₂)) ^-1 =
?t20

   • (## L (biadj_unit R p ◃ ## R α)
      • (psfunctor_comp L (biadj_unit R p)
           (# R f₂)) ^-1)) =

• ((# L (biadj_unit R p) ◃ ## L (## R α))
   • id₂ (# L (biadj_unit R p) · # L (# R f₂)))

B₁, B₂: bicat
L: psfunctor B₁ B₂
R: left_biadj_data L
y₁, y₂: B₁
p: bincoprod_cocone y₁ y₂
x: B₂
